body.title: Consolidate TheIgors runtime + config into ~/.UnseenUniversity
body.result: Migration complete: ~/TheIgors archived, paths updated across all devices, .unseen_university is canonical runtime, Igor running clean. Phases 2-7 all shipped.
body.description:
Everything currently split across ~/TheIgors (launcher, venv, lab/claudecode tools) and ~/.TheIgors (runtime state, logs, cfg files) should consolidate into UnseenUniversity. This is a sequenced migration — nothing removed until its replacement is live and tested.

Target directory schema:
  ~/.UnseenUniversity/
    <InstanceName>/config.cfg    # all cfg merged (replaces igor.cfg + switches.cfg + models.cfg + credentials.cfg)
    <InstanceName>/              # instance state
    logs/<InstanceName>/         # per-device logs
    claudecode/                  # CC slates, inbox
    cc_channel/                  # queue, channel state

Config philosophy: each rack device reads ~/.UnseenUniversity/<DeviceName>/config.cfg at boot — no env var soup. Launcher discovers instance by scanning ~/.UnseenUniversity/Igor-* count: 0 = fresh install wizard, 1 = use it, >1 = prompt which to start. --id flag overrides at runtime.

Migration sequence:
  Phase 1: UU venv + requirements (already done)
  Phase 2: Move lab/claudecode/ tools (cc_queue.py, channel.py, skills) into UU under lab/
  Phase 3: Introduce ~/.UnseenUniversity with compat shim reading ~/.TheIgors if new path absent
  Phase 4: Merge cfg files into single config.cfg per device; update all cfg readers
  Phase 5: Update launcher to use discovery logic (no IGOR_INSTANCE_ID env var)
  Phase 6: Remove IGOR_RUNTIME_ROOT, IGOR_INSTANCE_ID, IGOR_HOME_DB_URL as required env vars (fold into config.cfg defaults)
  Phase 7: Validate all paths, archive akienm/TheIgors GitHub repo, remove ~/TheIgors local install

**Affected files:** ~/TheIgors/lab/claudecode/* (move to UU), devices/igor/setup_assets/installer.py, ~/TheIgors/igor launcher, all cfg readers in devices/igor/, UU bin/superclaude
**Design rules:** no-env-var-required, config-per-device, discovery-first-then-prompt
**Scope boundary:** IN — full migration as sequenced above; OUT — do not change Igor cognition logic; do not break running Igor mid-migration (compat shim required through Phase 5)
**Test plan:** Fresh UU clone on clean machine: ./igor prompts for instance name, bootstraps, launches cleanly. Existing instance: ./igor finds one Igor-* dir, starts without prompts. Multiple instances: ./igor lists choices. pytest passes throughout all phases.
